info.title: fdbshell
info.description: Command line shell for exploring and querying a live FoundationDB cluster.

options.name: --connfile
options.description: The path of a file containing the connection string for the FoundationDB cluster.

options.name: --connStr
options.description: The connection string for the FoundationDB cluster.

options.name: --api
options.description: The API version level that should be used.

options.name: --partition
options.description: The name of the database partition to open.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Default timeout (in seconds) for failed transactions. [default: 30]

options.name: --retries
options.description: Default max retry count for failed transactions. [default: 10]

options.name: --aspire
options.description: Connect to a local docker instance managed by .NET Aspire

options.name: --docker
options.description: Connect to a local docker instance running on the given port

options.name: --child
options.description: Hash of the arguments of the parent process that spawned this instance

options.name: --parent
options.description: PID of the parent process that spawned this instance

options.name: --exec
options.description: Execute this command, and exits immediately.
